nodes.label: Plan And Implementation Quality Gate
nodes.rationale: Plans must be real engineering slices with invariants, failure paths, extension points, and real gameplay or smoke acceptance.

nodes.label: Open Rule Identifiers Instead Of Closed Enums
nodes.rationale: Game rules and content concepts remain open through FName, GameplayTag, data assets, registries, or strategy objects.
